name: C2xSetTokenPhys
title: C2xSetTokenPhys
syntax: long C2xSetTokenPhys(long packet, char[] protocolDesignator, char[] tokenDesignator, double value)
description: This function sets the physical value of the token in the packet. This function succeeds only if following requirements apply:

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket or was provided as callback function parameter.

parameters.name: protocolDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the protocol, e.g. CAM.

parameters.name: tokenDesignator
parameters.description: Name of the ASN.1 token, e.g. cam.camParameters.basicContainer.referencePosition.latitude.

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: The physical value of the token.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
